metadata.description: DIDHAD::did_had end-to-end parity fixture for HAD Phase 4 (PR #389 R-parity).
metadata.notes: Three synthetic DGPs (Uniform, Beta(2,2), Beta(0.5,1) approximation of the empirical Pierce-Schott NTR-gap distribution). Each DGP runs 5 method combos covering overall, event-study, placebo, yatchew, and trends_lin variants. Tolerances per the Phase 4 plan.
